emails.subject: Re: Wyden Bankruptcy Amendment
emails.body: Re: Wyden Bankruptcy Amendment In concert with others, the Enron legislative team participated in defeating the Wyden Amendment. It was tabled 67-30. very good outcome. Jeff Dasovich Sent by: Jeff Dasovich 03/14/2001 12:11 PM
